title: Verify floating pill appears from Day 2 to Day 10 for active trial
description: Test that the floating pill widget appears on homepage for users in Day 2-10 of their trial period
preconditions: Current day is between Day 2 and Day 10 of trial

steps.description: 1. Login with a user account that has an active trial on Day 2-10

expected_result: Floating pill with trial remaining days appears and is clickable
